message:
feat(inference): add Markov-modulated compound Poisson CPU burst feature layer (nao.14)

Implements Plan §4.6 / §2(G): a compound Poisson process model for CPU burst events
as a feature layer that emits deterministic summaries for the closed-form decision core.

Key features:
- CompoundPoissonAnalyzer for streaming burst event analysis
- Bayesian parameter estimation with Gamma conjugate priors for κ (event rate) and β (burst scale)
- Fano factor computation for burstiness detection
- Regime-specific parameter modeling
- Evidence generation for the inference ledger
- Comprehensive test suite (34 tests)

Model: N(t) ~ Poisson(κt), X_i ~ Exp(β), C(t) = Σ X_i yields finite-activity Lévy subordinator
with Laplace transform E[exp(-θC(t))] = exp(-κtθ/(β+θ))

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
